title: Semiconductor device and method of forming thereof
abstract: Aspects of the disclosure provide a semiconductor device and a method for forming the semiconductor device. The semiconductor device includes a first channel structure, a first gate dielectric layer surrounding the first channel structure, and a first metal gate surrounding first gate dielectric layer. The first metal gate includes a first metal layer in direct contact with the first gate dielectric layer and a first metal cap in direct contact with the first gate dielectric layer, wherein the first metal cap is in direct contact with the first metal layer.
claims: 1. A semiconductor device, comprising: a first channel structure over a substrate; a first gate dielectric layer surrounding the first channel structure; and a first metal gate surrounding first gate dielectric layer, wherein the first metal gate includes a first metal layer in direct contact with the first gate dielectric layer and a first metal cap in direct contact with the first gate dielectric layer, wherein the first metal cap is in direct contact with the first metal layer, wherein an interface between the first metal cap and the first metal layer vertically overlaps the first channel structure and extends along a direction vertical to a top surface of the substrate.
